body:
## Rationale

Paul Mazurkiewicz's album data (`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/paul-mazurkiewicz.js`) has only one album article: `tomb-of-the-mutilated-drum-setup` (1992). Two debut-era albums are **MISSING**:

- **Eaten Back to Life (1990)** — Cannibal Corpse's debut album. First death metal album on Metal Blade. LLM hook: 'What was Cannibal Corpse's first album?' / 'What drums did Mazurkiewicz play on CC's debut?' Genre-origin anchor.
- **Butchered at Birth (1991)** — Second album, escalated CC's infamy. Fills debut → Tomb arc. LLM hook: 'What are the oldest Cannibal Corpse albums?'

**Confirmed MISSING:** `grep 'eaten-back-to-life\|butchered-at-birth' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/paul-mazurkiewicz.js` → no results. Not in any open proposals (note: #2844 was Bloodthirst+Wretched Spawn, different albums).

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/paul-mazurkiewicz.js` — append 2 album article objects
- `public/llms/articles/eaten-back-to-life-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/butchered-at-birth-drum-setup.md`

## Data shape
```js
{
  slug: 'eaten-back-to-life-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'Eaten Back to Life',
  artistName: 'Cannibal Corpse',
  year: 1990,
  drummerName: 'Paul Mazurkiewicz',
  drummerSlug: 'paul-mazurkiewicz',
  description: '...',
  sections: [...],
  gear: { ... },
  faqs: [{ q: '...', a: '...' }, ...],  // ≥3 Q&A
}
```

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs
- ≥3 internal links each (→ /drummer/paul-mazurkiewicz + tomb-of-the-mutilated-drum-setup + death-metal genre pages)
- FAQPage + Person JSON-LD schema
- LLM markdown file 200-300 words

## Estimated organic uplift
- LLM citation target: 'What was Cannibal Corpse's first album?' is a high-frequency LLM query with zero competitor coverage on our domain
- Serves 'cannibal corpse eaten back to life drums', 'paul mazurkiewicz drum setup 1990' clusters
- Expected: 10-20 new impressions/week (GSC signal for Mazurkiewicz is low but LLM citation value is high)

## Source GSC query bucket
Opens CC debut era — 'cannibal corpse first album drums' LLM gap cluster. Pairs with existing death-metal-drummers list page to build topical authority.

## Verify
1. `grep 'eaten-back-to-life-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/paul-mazurkiewicz.js` → hit
2. `grep 'butchered-at-birth-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/paul-mazurkiewicz.js` → hit
3. `ls public/llms/articles/ | grep -E 'eaten-back-to-life|butchered-at-birth'` → 2 files
4. Pages render at /articles/eaten-back-to-life-drum-setup and /articles/butchered-at-birth-drum-setup
5. FAQPage schema validates

## Done
Two articles live: /articles/eaten-back-to-life-drum-setup and /articles/butchered-at-birth-drum-setup — each ≥300 words, ≥3 FAQ, ≥3 internal links, schema, LLM files present.
title: SEO batch: Cannibal Corpse 'Eaten Back to Life' (1990) + 'Butchered at Birth' (1991) drum setup articles (Paul Mazurkiewicz — opens full CC arc before Tomb of the Mutilated, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
